summary: Implemented ADR 0233 from the isolated latest-origin/main integration worktree by replaying `make converge-gitea`, seeding a durable repository token for private release-asset replay, publishing signed bundle assets into a private Gitea prerelease, and re-verifying those assets from the controller with the committed Cosign public key.

verification.observed: `python3 -m py_compile scripts/release_bundle.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_gitea_runtime_role.py` passed, `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_gitea_runtime_role.py` returned `19 passed in 0.28s`, `make syntax-check-gitea` passed, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` passed after the workflow and bootstrap surfaces were updated to seed and consume `RELEASE_BUNDLE_REPO_TOKEN` for private asset replay.

verification.check: Latest-origin/main Gitea converge with release-bundle secret seeding
verification.observed: `make converge-gitea` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0233-main-merge` with final recap `docker-build-lv3 ok=100 changed=5 failed=0`, `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=227 changed=2 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=24 changed=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=36 changed=4 failed=0`. A follow-up `curl -sS -H "Authorization: token ${GITEA_TOKEN}" http://100.64.0.1:3009/api/v1/repos/ops/platform_server/actions/secrets | jq -r '.[].name'` confirmed `RELEASE_BUNDLE_REPO_TOKEN` alongside the existing Cosign signing secrets.

verification.check: Private Gitea push gate and workflow replay
verification.observed: A private push of branch head `2fb56c14b62a73d0de47cb367a78c987dfd257c5` to `http://100.64.0.1:3009/ops/platform_server.git` passed the full server-side gate and produced successful workflow runs `68` and `69`. Internal Gitea API verification showed run `68` completed `success` with jobs `publish` (`job_id: 85`) and `verify` (`job_id: 86`), and run `69` completed `success` for `validate` (`job_id: 87`).

Gitea release `10` for tag `bundle-branch-codex-ws-0233-main-merge-2fb56c14b62a` now carries asset `lv3-control-bundle-branch-codex-ws-0233-main-merge-2fb56c14b62a.tar.gz` (`uuid: 86fde43f-4a2a-4165-8fc3-9c85657510e0`), the Sigstore bundle `...tar.gz.sigstore.json` (`uuid: 36f9aec9-bf52-42be-b08e-bee77d782843`), and checksum `...tar.gz.sha256` (`uuid: f473aecc-9e54-4444-976f-9e31f9946380`).

verification.check: Controller-side Cosign verification against private assets
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/release_bundle.py verify-release --gitea-url http://10.10.10.20:3003 --repository ops/platform_server --release-tag bundle-branch-codex-ws-0233-main-merge-2fb56c14b62a --output-dir /tmp/lv3-release-bundle-verify-main-0233 --public-key-path keys/gitea-release-bundle-cosign.pub --api-token "$GITEA_TOKEN" --cosign-path .tmp/bin/cosign-darwin` succeeded and reported `bundle_sha256: da9139777eadf4d0a6f4b520decc40781fb13282486ef67326217990e6223a8f`, `ref_name: codex/ws-0233-main-merge`, `commit: 2fb56c14b62a73d0de47cb367a78c987dfd257c5`, and `file_count: 1930`.

notes: The durable repository secret `RELEASE_BUNDLE_REPO_TOKEN` is seeded from the mirrored Gitea admin token because the workflow-scoped `github.token` equivalent cannot replay private release assets on this platform.

This isolated-worktree receipt preserves the first fully successful publication and verification proof; the paired `mainline-live-apply` receipt records the same verified candidate as the canonical basis for the protected mainline release and platform-version bump.
